overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character in dark robes exploring a historic Gothic castle courtyard with cobblestone paths, stone architecture, and lush spring vegetation under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard entrance with stone steps

events.description: character descends from covered stone doorway into the open courtyard

agents.ego_description: wizard character in dark robes walking down stone steps into the courtyard

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading down from the Gothic doorway
tall stone Gothic building with arched windows surrounding the courtyard
stone statue monument with water features in the courtyard center
stone bench with decorative planters alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the entrance to a Gothic castle courtyard, with the character descending weathered stone steps from a covered doorway. The cobblestone path leads toward a central statue monument, surrounded by historic stone architecture with arched windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: open castle courtyard with central monument and lawns

events.description: character transitions from descending to walking forward across the flat courtyard

agents.ego_description: character walking across the cobblestone courtyard toward the central statue area

notable_agents.action: distant figure in wizard robes walking near the far archway

entered.detail: well-maintained green grass with scattered yellow flowers

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the open courtyard, passing stone benches and crossing cobblestone paths surrounded by green lawns. The central statue monument grows closer while distant NPCs in robes can be seen walking near the far archways.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway along the Gothic cloister wall

events.description: character moves from open courtyard into the covered walkway alongside the stone building

agents.ego_description: character walking along the stone building wall with dense bushes on the right side

entered.detail: Gothic stone archway entrance at the end of the walkway
dense green shrubbery lining the cobblestone path

segments.scene_description: The character transitions into a covered walkway running alongside the Gothic building wall, with dense bushes lining the right side of the cobblestone path. The stone archway entrance looms ahead as the character moves deeper into the historic cloister.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open entrance of a Gothic castle courtyard into the sheltered confines of a historic cloister. It begins with the character descending weathered stone steps from a covered doorway, following a cobblestone path that leads toward a central statue monument framed by arched windows. As the character moves further into the open courtyard, the camera passes stone benches and green lawns while distant robed figures wander near far archways. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the open air to enter a covered walkway running alongside the building wall, with dense bushes lining the path. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the historic cloister as a looming stone archway entrance comes into view.
